chapter goal: How do projective and complex tools give two coordinated models of the same hyperbolic plane?
computational checks: cross-ratio invariance under a projective reparametrization
join/meet incidence for generated homogeneous points
mode-specific conic or hyperbolic numeric check when relevant
gaps: Proof-heavy material in Chapter 25 is represented by hyperbolic diagrams, determinant/cross-ratio checks, or small parameter experiments rather than copied text.
